title: dupatya conduplicata
intro: Dupatya conduplicata, also known as the 'folded Dupatya', is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Dupatya conduplicata is traditionally prepared as a powder, decoction, or oil, which can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and ointments.
